notes: CORRECTS verification_report_v2.json, which was WRONG: v2 claimed all 4 binary figures 'verified' at integrity 98 based on a loose tolerance/magnitude-variant match that was mistaken for a literal match. Re-checked with the Step-1b extraction (xlrd/pdftotext) AND context inspection: only 2 of the 4 verify — rights issue 4,250 (explicit 'INR 4,250 Mn' in the transcript) and finance cost 1,766 (parenthesized, in the finance-cost band). The other 2 do NOT trace: D&A 2,442 (the only '2442' is inside the ratio -0.092442) and FY23 FCF 1,184 (coincidental substrings) — both plausibly derived/aggregated, flagged low-severity for the analyst to substantiate, not evidence of fabrication. Core rating drivers (reported PAT 138, adjusted PAT 557, EPS 3.43, EV/EBITDA 34.6, FCF 586, real price 646.15, ROIC<WACC) remain verified; all scenario/target/RR math reconciles; anchors agree. Verdict downgraded Clean->Minor issues and integrity 90->88 to reflect 2 genuinely-untraceable secondary figures (decision unaffected — the rating rests on ROIC<WACC + valuation + governance, all verified). v3 is authoritative; v1 and the erroneous v2 are retained append-only as the correction trail.
